'''chazuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feathermonger|feathermonger]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-z-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feathermonger|feathermonger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chazuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæzichith|chæzichith]] || [[word:chæzichij|chæzichij]] || [[word:chæzichish|chæzichish]] || [[word:chæzichi|chæzichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chazuzuchuth|chazuzuchuth]] || [[word:chazuzuchuj|chazuzuchuj]] || [[word:chazuzuchush|chazuzuchush]] || [[word:chazuzuchu|chazuzuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chazuchuth|chazuchuth]] || [[word:chazuchuj|chazuchuj]] || [[word:chazuchush|chazuchush]] || [[word:chazuchu|chazuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chazufchuth|chazufchuth]] || [[word:chazufchuj|chazufchuj]] || [[word:chazufchush|chazufchush]] || [[word:chazufchuf|chazufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chazuchuthu|chazuchuthu]] || [[word:chazuchuju|chazuchuju]] || [[word:chazuchushu|chazuchushu]] || [[word:chazuchuku|chazuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chazuchuth|chazuchuth]] || [[word:chazuchuj|chazuchuj]] || [[word:chazuchush|chazuchush]] || [[word:chazuchu|chazuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chazuchuthul|chazuchuthul]] || [[word:chazuchujul|chazuchujul]] || [[word:chazuchushul|chazuchushul]] || [[word:chazuchukul|chazuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chazuchuthuthu|chazuchuthuthu]] || [[word:chazuchujuju|chazuchujuju]] || [[word:chazuchushushu|chazuchushushu]] || [[word:chazuchuku|chazuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chazuchuthun|chazuchuthun]] || [[word:chazuchujun|chazuchujun]] || [[word:chazuchushun|chazuchushun]] || [[word:chazuchukun|chazuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chazuchuthuoro|chazuchuthuoro]] || [[word:chazuchujuoro|chazuchujuoro]] || [[word:chazuchushuoro|chazuchushuoro]] || [[word:chazuchukuoro|chazuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
